scenarios.guidance: Restore the exact authoritative file from the expected commit. Do not recreate it from memory.
Stop the production line, restore or repair on an isolated branch, then run the full contract suite.
Check out the exact reviewed commit before trusting screenshots, reports or restore packages.
Use separate source and restore locations. Never test recovery by overwriting the only surviving copy.
Document the missing helper and continue only if the current task does not depend on it.

notProven: production incident response under live load
